## Description

Describe the change and what problem it solves.

## Related Issue

Closes #(issue number)

## Type of Change

- [ ] New model or experiment
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Chore (tooling, dependencies)

## Checklist

- [ ] Code runs without errors
- [ ] Results documented and caveated
- [ ] Notebook outputs cleared
- [ ] No large files or datasets included
